text.title: templates Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for templates as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Generating all documents in one pass without waiting for review gates.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Design errors compound if not caught early. Testing gaps don't surface until implementation. Reviews gate quality; skipping them trades short-term speed for long-term cost.

failure-mode.description: Task.md files generated without reading design.md; task scopes are mis-sized or misaligned.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Task generation requires design context. Agents without design create tasks that violate architecture or miss dependencies.

failure-mode.description: Feature folder naming collisions (feature-024-starter-kits) causing silent overwrites.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents don't detect existing folders by default. Always check .aidocs/ before creating new feature folders.

failure-mode.description: Agents skip the traceability check: tasks don't reference implementation-plan rows, rows don't reference design decisions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without traceability, executor agents lose context. Always verify that each task.md references the implementation-plan row and design AD.

failure-mode.description: Token budget estimates in implementation-plan become stale after context is loaded.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reading 20k-token codebase evaporates budget fast. Add 20k buffer for agents reading large existing code.

failure-mode.description: Agents writing multiple files in one turn silently truncate later files when approaching context limits.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Generate documents in separate turns or verify file sizes before merging. Monitor agent output for truncation patterns.
